name: SUI Group Holdings Ltd.
business: Sui Group Holdings Limited launched a SUI treasury strategy, under which it holds SUI tokens as its principal treasury asset. It generates income through staking rewards and digital asset lending. Additionally, it continues to operate a legacy specialty finance business providing short-term loans to private businesses and high-net-worth individuals.
sellsTo: Investors seeking exposure to SUI through a publicly traded vehicle
Private businesses, micro- and small-cap public companies, high-net-worth individuals (legacy lending)

exposures.sentence: In 2025, we undertook a strategic shift by launching the industry s first SUI treasury strategy, under which the principal holding in our treasury reserve on the balance sheet is allocated to the native cryptocurrency of the Sui blockchain (commonly referred to as SUI ).

A significant majority of these holdings continue to be staked, generating an annualized yield of approximately 1.7% with the remaining holdings deployed toward higher yield-generating lending opportunities.

During the fourth quarter of 2025, we also entered into certain digital asset lending arrangements, which resulted in the recognition of a digital loan receivable, measured at fair value, reflecting an extension of our broader digital asset activities.

catalysts.event: Launch of eSui Dollar (suiUSDe) on Sui Mainnet
catalysts.sentence: On February 11, 2026, the Company announced that its native synthetic dollar, eSui Dollar (suiUSDe), launched on Sui Mainnet.

catalysts.event: Deployment of $10 million suiUSDe into Ember Protocol vault
catalysts.sentence: Additionally, SUI Group announced the deployment of $10 million in newly minted suiUSDe into a vault operated by Ember Protocol, a vault and investment infrastructure provider incubated by the team behind Bluefin.

catalysts.event: Intent to use approximately $140 million of Cash PIPE Proceeds to acquire additional SUI in the open market
catalysts.sentence: For the 12 months following the Private Placement, subject to market conditions, the Company intends to continue to use approximately $140 million of Cash PIPE Proceeds to acquire additional SUI, in the open market with the Asset Manager as execution trader.
